title: Change the updates view from Full Screen to Half Screen (Similar to Work Management)
excerpt: When me and my team changed to the new CRM Product, we immediately noticed a difference in the updates tab. The updates now show as a full screen rather than a half screen for which we could scroll along Monday on the ot…

posts.author: Chris_Essential (Chris Griffin)
posts.cookedHtml: When me and my team changed to the new CRM Product, we immediately noticed a difference in the updates tab. The updates now show as a full screen rather than a half screen for which we could scroll along Monday on the other half of the screen. If we could add this to the CRM Product that would be awesome.

posts.author: slyons (Shannon Lyons)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes please. This has to be the most annoying thing, from work management to CRM

posts.author: YSteinberg (Yoel S)
posts.cookedHtml: Agree. our one negative so far since our migration to CRM

posts.author: WirkKarl (Karl)
posts.cookedHtml: Totally get what you mean having the updates take the full screen can feel a bit much, especially if you’re used to scrolling alongside other boards. Being able to shrink it to half-screen like in Work Management would make multitasking so much easier. I’ve been keeping notes on feature ideas in Phonexa, and this one definitely goes on my list it would save a lot of back-and-forth.

posts.author: Kofi (Kofi FiftyTechSolutions.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Can someone confirm if this is going to ever resolved?

Its so annoying wasting 60% of the screen to empty space, which could have been used to give visiblity of where I am in the board…
